title: Got Dropped Into A Ghost Story, Still Gotta Work
description: An unofficial fan reader for Got Dropped Into A Ghost Story, Still Gotta Work (GSGW).
_comment_announcement: Site-wide banner shown above the main content on every page. Hide it by setting text to "" (or removing the block). href (optional) turns the text into a link. dismissible adds an × that stores the current banner id under a single localStorage key (gsgw-announce-dismissed), overwritten on each dismiss so it never accumulates stray keys. Bump id to re-show the banner to everyone after an edit.

announcement.text: 🎨 Part 3 launch fan art contest — win $15! Enter by July 6, 23:59 KST. Join our Discord for info →

_comment_themes: Theme [slug, label] pairs for the settings <select>; slugs must match [data-theme=…] blocks in assets/css/themes.css.
_comment_parts: Story parts for the Parts landing page + per-part TOCs. start/end are inclusive chapter numbers; a part with no start is treated as 'coming soon' (no TOC generated). Optional 'release' (YYYY-MM-DD) shows a release date on a coming-soon part.
_comment_links: Footer icon-button links. The Info button always points at the internal /about.html page; discord/github are external.
